# The Stocker Group Global

A fully operational Remote Online Notary (RON) service offering a comprehensive range of notarial acts entirely online for US citizens worldwide through trusted platforms including Notarize/Proof, BlueNotary, and CyberizeIt. The service emphasizes global accessibility, near-round-the-clock availability, and a wide breadth of document types — from wills and trusts to passport certifications and loan signings. The brand projects professionalism, legal authority, and convenience, positioning itself as a reliable one-stop notary solution for clients regardless of their physical location.

Source: https://the-stocker-group-global-b706101a.zappy5.app

---

# Remote Online Notary Service for U.S. Citizens Worldwide.



### Fully operational on trusted RON platforms including Notarize/Proof, BlueNotary, and CyberizeIt, with online notarial acts available for U.S. citizens wherever they are located.




Schedule a Session



View Notary Services






















## Notarial Acts Handled Online


A comprehensive suite of remote notarization services available globally for US citizens. Connect with a commissioned notary from anywhere, at any time.












RON Certified


### Acknowledgements & Jurats


Formal verification of signer identity and willingness. Includes acknowledgment statements and sworn jurat affidavits executed remotely with full legal validity.









RON Certified


### Affidavits & Oaths


Administering oaths and affirmations for sworn written statements. Ideal for legal affidavits, court documents, and statutory declarations.









RON Certified


### Contracts & Legal Certificates


Notarization of business contracts, agreements, and certified legal documents. Ensuring enforceability and authenticity across jurisdictions.









RON Certified


### Powers of Attorney


Secure remote notarization of power of attorney documents. A trusted notary public power of attorney service for financial, medical, and durable POA needs.









RON Certified


### Wills & Trusts


Confidential notarization of last wills, living trusts, and estate planning documents. Handled with the utmost discretion and legal precision.









RON Certified


### Passport Certification


Certified true copies of passports and government-issued IDs. Essential for international applications, visa processing, and identity verification.









RON Certified


### Property & Escrow Documents


Notarization of deeds, mortgages, and escrow instructions. Facilitating smooth real estate transactions regardless of your location.









RON Certified


### Loan Notarization & Signing Agent


Professional notary signing agent services for loan packages, refinancing documents, and HELOC signings. Certified expertise for error-free closings.







Additional document types may be available, and some restrictions may apply. Contact our offices today for information and to book your appointment.














## From Anywhere to Notarized in Three Clear Steps


A straightforward, secure pathway from your initial inquiry to a completed online notarization session, designed to make the process feel calm and official.




1

### Call or Message to Confirm the Document


Reach out to discuss your document needs. We'll verify eligibility, explain requirements, and ensure you have everything ready for a smooth notarization.



2

### Choose a Supported RON Platform


Select from trusted platforms including Notarize/Proof, BlueNotary, or CyberizeIt. We'll guide you to the best fit for your document type and schedule.



3

### Complete Identity Verification and Meet Online


Verify your identity securely online and meet with a commissioned notary via live video. Your document is signed, sealed, and delivered digitally.




Availability may extend near round-the-clock by appointment, depending on schedule and platform requirements.













## Built for U.S. Citizens Wherever Life Takes Them.


As a fully operational Remote Online Notary, I perform notarial acts for any U.S. citizen anywhere in the world. We operate exclusively through trusted, secure platforms — Notarize/Proof, BlueNotary, and CyberizeIt — ensuring your documents are handled with the highest level of legal authority and convenience. From powers of attorney and wills to loan signings and passport certifications, your documents are in expert hands, available by appointment near-round-the-clock.

Schedule Your Appointment

## Online Notary Support for Real-World Situations.


Wherever you are, whenever you need it — our remote online notary services are designed to fit your life, your schedule, and your legal requirements.













### U.S. Citizens Abroad


Living overseas shouldn't complicate your legal paperwork. Whether you need a power of attorney notarized or a passport certification, our RON platform connects you with a commissioned notary public from anywhere in the world. No embassy visits required.











### Remote Real Estate Buyers


Closing on a property from another state or country is seamless with our loan signing and escrow document notarizations. We handle the critical final steps so you can focus on getting the keys to your new home.











### Military Personnel and Families


PCS moves, deployments, and legal readiness require reliable document support. We provide flexible, 24-hour notary services tailored to the unique demands of military life, ensuring your affidavits and powers of attorney are always in order.











### Estate and Personal Document Clients


Protecting your legacy starts with properly executed documents. From wills and trusts to general notary acknowledgements, we guide you through every signature with the gravity and care your personal legal matters deserve.










### Ready to get your documents notarized?


Call or message today to set up a session. Our team is available near-round-the-clock to accommodate your schedule.


Schedule Your Appointment















Global legal and notary services you can trust. Precision, discretion, and authority in every document.

# Comprehensive Online Notary Services


The Stocker Group Global performs a wide range of remote online notarial acts for U.S. citizens worldwide through supported RON platforms, subject to applicable restrictions and appointment availability.



















## Comprehensive Notarial Services, Delivered Online


As a fully operational Remote Online Notary (RON), The Stocker Group Global provides a complete spectrum of notarial acts for US citizens anywhere in the world. From identity certification to complex real estate transactions, our platform-based service combines legal authority with global convenience, available near-round-the-clock to meet your scheduling needs.








### Identity & Certification


- Passport Certification

- Degree & Qualification Certification

- Document Authenticity Certification

- General Notarization







### Legal & Personal Documents


- Wills & Trusts Notarizations

- Powers of Attorney Document Notarization

- Affidavit & Oath Notarization

- Legal Certificate Notarization







### Real Estate & Financial Documents


- Property & Escrow Document Notarization

- Loan Notarization

- Demand for Payment Notarization

- Contract Notarization







### General Notarial Acts


- Acknowledgement Statement Notarization

- Jurat & Notary Acknowledgements

- Notary Signing Agent Services

- And More — Call to Inquire








Need a document notarized that isn't listed? Our experienced team handles a wide range of notarial acts. Contact us to discuss your specific requirements.

Book Your Appointment Today













## Supported Remote Online Notary Platforms


Your notarial session is completed through trusted, secure RON environments. Platform availability and requirements may vary — call or message to determine the best session path for your documents.






Official RON Platform


### Notarize / Proof


A leading digital notarization platform offering secure, compliant remote online notary sessions with integrated identity verification and audit trails.




Identity Proofing



Audit Trail



KBA Compliance






Official RON Platform


### BlueNotary


An intuitive, user-friendly remote notarization service with seamless scheduling and robust credential analysis for a smooth session.




Credential Analysis



Seamless Scheduling



Session Recording






Official RON Platform


### CyberizeIt


A secure, modern platform built for efficient remote online notarization with flexible document handling and reliable e-signature integration.




E-Signature



Flexible Handling



Secure Vault







Call or Message to Set Up a Session


* Platform availability may vary based on document type and jurisdiction. Contact us for personalized guidance.











## Important Session Considerations


To ensure a seamless and secure online notarization experience, please review the following guidelines. Some restrictions may apply based on document type, signer location, and platform rules. We are committed to accommodating your needs, including 24-hour service based on availability.








### Identity Verification Required


All signers must complete a secure identity verification process through the RON platform (Notarize/Proof, BlueNotary, or CyberizeIt). This typically involves a government-issued photo ID and a series of knowledge-based authentication questions to confirm your identity before the session begins.









### Document & Jurisdiction Eligibility


Certain documents such as wills, trusts, powers of attorney, and real estate instruments may have specific requirements depending on the signer's location and the jurisdiction where the document will be filed. As a notary public power of attorney specialist, we ensure full compliance with relevant state laws and platform capabilities.









### Appointment Availability


We offer near-round-the-clock availability to serve US citizens worldwide. While standard sessions are scheduled during business hours, we will accommodate 24-hour service based on availability. For urgent notarizations or tight deadlines, please contact us directly to arrange a priority session.






Book Your Session















Global legal and notary services you can trust. Precision, discretion, and authority in every document.

URL: https://the-stocker-group-global-b706101a.zappy5.app/how-it-works
Description: Discover how to notarize documents online effortlessly via Notarize, BlueNotary, or CyberizeIt. A fast, secure legal notary experience, no matter where you are.

Your 24/7 Notary, Three Clicks Away — The Stocker Group Global

# How Remote Online Notarization Works


A streamlined, fully digital process designed for U.S. citizens located anywhere in the world, subject to eligibility. From document preparation to the completed notarial act, our platform ensures a secure and convenient experience.











01






### Confirm Your Document


Select the type of notarial act you need — from wills and trusts to passport certifications or powers of attorney. Our team reviews your document to ensure it meets all legal requirements before we proceed.







02






### Prepare Identification


Have your valid government-issued photo ID ready. Our RON platform uses secure identity verification and knowledge-based authentication (KBA) to confirm your identity, ensuring compliance with notary public license law.







03






### Join the RON Platform Session


Connect with a commissioned notary public via our trusted platforms — Notarize/Proof, BlueNotary, or CyberizeIt. The live audio-video session is recorded and conducted with the same legal authority as an in-person notarization.







04






### Receive the Completed Notarial Act


Once the session is complete, your electronically signed and sealed document is delivered immediately. The tamper-evident digital certificate ensures your notarized document is recognized and legally binding.








Available near-round-the-clock based on availability. Call or message our offices today to set up your session.

Book Your Appointment








## What to Prepare Before Your Session


To ensure a smooth, efficient, and legally compliant remote online notarization, we recommend having the following items ready before your scheduled session. Proper preparation helps us serve you with the white-glove professionalism you deserve.








### Valid Identification


Government-issued photo ID such as a driver's license, passport, or state ID card. Your identification will be verified through our secure platform's credential analysis technology.








### Complete Unsigned Documents Where Appropriate


Have your documents prepared but unsigned where a notarial act is required. We will witness your electronic signature during the live session to ensure full legal validity.








### Reliable Internet and Camera Access


A stable internet connection and a device with a functioning camera and microphone are essential for identity verification and the real-time audio-visual communication required by law.





Platform requirements may vary. Contact our team for guidance on your specific document type and notary platform.















## Designed for Worldwide Access







### For U.S. Citizens Abroad


We are live and fully operational as a Remote Online Notary (RON) on Notarize/Proof, BlueNotary, and CyberizeIt Platforms. We perform notarial acts online for any US citizen anywhere in the world, ensuring your legal documents are handled promptly and professionally from any location.







### Appointment Availability Based on Schedule


We understand that legal matters don't adhere to a 9-to-5 schedule. We accommodate 24-hour service based on availability, offering near-round-the-clock appointment windows to meet your urgent notary public power of attorney and certification needs.







### Call or Message to Coordinate a Session


Some restrictions may apply. Reach out to our offices today to discuss your requirements and book your appointment. Whether you prefer a call or a message, we are ready to coordinate a session that fits your schedule.

Contact Us Today













## Frequently Asked Questions


Answers to the most common inquiries about our remote online notary services. If you have additional questions, we are here to help.










### Can I use this service from outside the United States?


Absolutely. Our Remote Online Notary (RON) service is designed for US citizens anywhere in the world. Whether you are traveling, living abroad, or stationed overseas, you can complete your notarial acts online with a commissioned US notary public. All you need is a reliable internet connection and a valid US government-issued ID.










### Which platforms are supported?


We operate on the industry's most trusted and secure platforms: Notarize/Proof, BlueNotary, and CyberizeIt. These platforms are fully compliant with state laws and provide a seamless, encrypted audio-visual session. Once you book your appointment, we will guide you to the appropriate platform and walk you through the simple setup process.










### What kinds of documents can be notarized?


We offer a comprehensive range of notarial acts. This includes, but is not limited to, wills and trusts, powers of attorney, loan signings, passport certifications, affidavits, contracts, jurats, acknowledgements, and property or escrow documents. If you need a specific document notarized, such as a notary public power of attorney, please contact us to confirm the details and schedule your session.










### Is 24-hour service guaranteed?


We strive to accommodate near-round-the-clock service based on availability. While we aim to fulfill 24-hour requests, some restrictions may apply depending on the complexity of the document and the platform's operating hours. We recommend calling or messaging us today to secure your preferred time slot, and we will do our absolute best to meet your timeline.










### What if my document has special requirements?


Special requirements are our expertise. Whether you need a certified translation attached, multiple witnesses, or a specific notarial certificate format, we can adapt our service to meet your document's unique needs. We recommend reaching out to discuss the specifics before your session so we can ensure full compliance with the relevant legal notary standards and prepare the session accordingly.







Still have questions? We are ready to assist you with your legal notary needs.

Contact Our Office











Global legal and notary services you can trust. Precision, discretion, and authority in every document.

# A Reliable Online Notary Resource for U.S. Citizens Worldwide


The Stocker Group Global is a fully operational Remote Online Notary (RON) service committed to professionalism, global accessibility, and dependable guidance. Whether you need a power of attorney notarized, a passport certification, or a complex loan signing, our platform connects U.S. citizens anywhere in the world with a seamless, legally sound online notarization experience — all from the comfort of your home or office.




Live and fully operational on Notarize/Proof, BlueNotary, and CyberizeIt Platforms — serving US citizens worldwide with near-round-the-clock availability.



Schedule Your Session
Explore Services



















## Our Core Values


Guided by principles that define our commitment to legal excellence and global accessibility.









### Professional Authority


Our fully commissioned Remote Online Notary service is backed by rigorous compliance and legal training. We bring the same level of trust and formality you expect from a traditional law office directly to your screen, ensuring every notarial act meets the highest standards of integrity and precision.









### Global Accessibility


Location should never be a barrier to essential legal services. We serve US citizens anywhere in the world, leveraging secure platforms like Notarize/Proof, BlueNotary, and CyberizeIt to connect with you instantly. Whether you are abroad or at home, your legal notary is just a click away.









### Responsive Availability


Legal matters don't adhere to a 9-to-5 schedule. We accommodate near-round-the-clock service based on availability, ensuring you can execute time-sensitive documents like powers of attorney or loan signings without delay. We prioritize your urgency with concierge-level responsiveness.









### Broad Document Capability


From a simple notary public power of attorney to complex wills, trusts, passport certifications, and property escrow documents, our expertise spans the full spectrum of notarial acts. As your dedicated notary signing agent, we handle the details so you can proceed with confidence.













## Real Scenarios, Real Solutions


From passport certifications abroad to complex property closings, our remote online notary service meets you where you are — anywhere in the world, at any hour.






Scenario 01

### The Global Citizen


A U.S. citizen abroad needs a passport-related certification for an urgent visa application. Time zones are against them, and finding a local notary who understands U.S. requirements is nearly impossible. Our platform connects them with a commissioned notary public power of attorney specialist within hours, verifying identity via secure video and delivering a legally binding, digitally sealed document before their deadline.

Learn more about international certifications












Scenario 02

### The Remote Homebuyer


A couple is purchasing a vacation property in another state. They need escrow and property document notarizations but can't travel for the closing. Using our loan notarization and property and escrow document notarization services, they complete the entire signing process from their kitchen table. The notary verifies their identities, witnesses signatures, and affixes a digital seal recognized nationwide.

Explore property & escrow services






Scenario 03

### The Military Family


A military family stationed overseas needs to coordinate important legal documents — powers of attorney, wills, and trusts — across multiple time zones. With our 24-hour availability and experience with military documentation, we schedule sessions that work for every family member, no matter where they are deployed. Every document is handled with the precision and confidentiality expected of a legal notary near me, even when "near me" means thousands of miles away.

View wills & trusts notarizations



















## Professional Notary Support Without the Geographic Barrier.




As a fully operational Remote Online Notary (RON) on Notarize/Proof, BlueNotary, and CyberizeIt Platforms, The Stocker Group Global delivers comprehensive notarial acts for any US citizen anywhere in the world. From wills and trusts to passport certifications and loan signings, we provide near-round-the-clock availability with the legal authority and concierge-level care your documents demand.




Contact The Stocker Group Global











### Secure Platform Session


Your documents are handled through encrypted, state-compliant RON platforms ensuring every session meets the highest legal standards.








### Clear Document Guidance


We walk you through every required notarial act — from acknowledgements and jurats to complex loan signings — so nothing is overlooked.








### Appointment-Based Access


Schedule a session that fits your timezone and calendar — we accommodate 24-hour service based on availability for clients worldwide.



















Global legal and notary services you can trust. Precision, discretion, and authority in every document.

# Call or Message to Set Up a Session


Reach out to confirm your document type, platform options, and appointment availability for remote online notarization.











### Document Type


Let us know which documents you need notarized — from powers of attorney and wills to loan signings and passport certifications — so we can prepare the appropriate notarial act for your session.









### Preferred Timing


Share your preferred appointment window. We accommodate near-round-the-clock availability based on your time zone, including early mornings, evenings, and weekends where possible.









### Location or Time Zone


Confirm your signer location and time zone. As a Remote Online Notary serving US citizens worldwide, we coordinate across continents to ensure a seamless, compliant notarization experience.










## Schedule Your Remote Notary Session


Complete the intake form below and our team will confirm your appointment promptly.








Full Name



Email Address



Phone Number



Your Message






I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  and  Privacy Policy




Submit Inquiry











### Guidance for Your Inquiry


To help us serve you efficiently, please include the following details in your message:


- Document type (e.g., Power of Attorney, Will, Passport Certification)

- Your location or time zone

- Preferred appointment window

- Preferred RON platform (Notarize/Proof, BlueNotary, CyberizeIt) if any




We offer near-round-the-clock availability for US citizens anywhere in the world.

















## Before You Reach Out


A few quick steps to ensure your notary session goes smoothly, no matter where you are in the world.












### Know the Document You Need Notarized


Identify the exact form required — whether it's a power of attorney, an affidavit, or a passport certification. Having the document ready ensures we can match it to the correct notarial act without delay.









### Confirm Signer Availability


All required signers must be present during the live video session. Coordinate schedules in advance — we offer near-round-the-clock availability to accommodate different time zones.









### Be Ready for Platform Identity Verification


Our secure online platforms will verify your identity. Keep a valid government-issued photo ID handy, and ensure you have a stable internet connection for a seamless notarization experience.












## Ready to Begin Your Online Notary Session?


Contact The Stocker Group Global today to discuss your document, confirm availability, and choose the right supported platform for your session.


Send a Message
















Global legal and notary services you can trust. Precision, discretion, and authority in every document.

## Privacy Policy

Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  7/15/2026



The Stocker Group Global ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: The Stocker Group Global

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice














Global legal and notary services you can trust. Precision, discretion, and authority in every document.

## Accessibility Statement

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  July 15, 2026



The Stocker Group Global is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: The Stocker Group Global

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.














Global legal and notary services you can trust. Precision, discretion, and authority in every document.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  July 15, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - The Stocker Group Global

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Legal & Notary Services provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


The Stocker Group Global provides Legal & Notary Services through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by The Stocker Group Global. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: The Stocker Group Global

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
